one_line_description: Freshworks' cloud helpdesk for ticketing, knowledge base, and customer support automation.
auth_summary: API key used via HTTP Basic Auth (apikey:X, base64-encoded); every user can copy their personal API key from Profile Settings. No OAuth2 for the core Freshdesk API.
access_notes: Self-serve signup (free trial/free tier); the personal API key is available immediately from the user's Profile Settings page in the support portal.
api_surface_summary: REST API v2 covering tickets, conversations, contacts, companies, agents, groups, roles, solutions (KB), surveys, time entries, automations, SLA policies, and custom objects.
agent_notes: Official Freshworks MCP server exists but is in beta/Early Access Program limited to selected Enterprise-plan customers and authenticates via API key only; multiple community MCP servers (e.g. NeuraLegion, Enreign, effytech) are freely available. API-key-only auth means per-user credential entry rather than OAuth connect flow.
